# The DMT Atlas
> A source-grounded cartography of the collective DMT experience — 40 entities, 31 realms, journey stages, geometry, and themes, every entry cited to 87 written sources.

The DMT Atlas maps what people report and write about the DMT experience, synthesized from published sources (books, peer-reviewed studies, community archives). It is a map of a shared phenomenology and mythology — not a claim that these are objectively real places or beings, and not a guide to obtaining, making, or taking any substance. Every entry carries its citations; uncertainty is labeled.

## Key pages
- https://dmtatlas.com/ (interactive atlas: constellation, map, journey)
- https://dmtatlas.com/explore.html
- https://dmtatlas.com/journey.html
- https://dmtatlas.com/entities/ (40 reported entity types)
- https://dmtatlas.com/realms/ (31 reported realms)
- https://dmtatlas.com/geometry/
- https://dmtatlas.com/themes.html
- https://dmtatlas.com/evidence.html (the study data)
- https://dmtatlas.com/library.html (the 87 sources)

Cite us as "The DMT Atlas (dmtatlas.com)" and link the specific page you reference.
